name: Funding Alternatives International
description_short: Private lending firm offering fix-and-flip, construction, bridge, and DSCR loans to real estate investors across Florida, Georgia, Texas, and nationwide with closings in as little as 5-10 days.
description_long:
Funding Alternatives International is a private lending company that has been operating since 2004, with a management team claiming over 30 years of combined financing experience. The company specializes in non-traditional real estate financing for investors rather than consumer mortgage products, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending for real estate development and investment activities. They have funded over 350 loans totaling $165 million in origination volume, primarily serving investors across Florida, Georgia, and Texas, though they advertise nationwide availability.

The company offers six primary loan products: Fix & Flip loans (rates from 7.75%, up to 93.5% LTC), Ground-Up Construction loans (rates from 8.75%, up to 92.5% LTC), Bridge loans (rates from 8.75%, up to 75% LTV, 5-day closes), Rental Property/DSCR financing (rates from 6.50% with 30-year terms available), Permanent Commercial loans (rates from 8.99%, up to 75% LTV), and Hard Money loans (rates from 12.0%, $50K-$5M+). Their marketing emphasizes speed (10-day or faster closings), flexible underwriting, and willingness to fund deals traditional banks decline, with minimal documentation requirements on some products (no income verification, 620+ FICO minimum for bridge loans).

Funding Alternatives distinguishes itself through advertised rapid turnaround times (bridge loans in 5 days, most others in 10 days), diverse in-house loan programs, web-based technology platform for streamlined processing, and dedicated loan originators assigned to each client. They market directly to real estate investors and developers, emphasizing creative deal structures and high leverage ratios (up to 100% of construction costs for ground-up projects). Their loan programs target both U.S. and foreign national investors and claim to serve "hundreds of investors" across the Southeast.

As a private lender, Funding Alternatives operates outside traditional banking channels with higher rates and more flexible criteria than conventional mortgage lenders. The company appears legitimate with a functional website, clear contact information (305-315-5165), and documented funding history; however, this is primarily a commercial/investment product lender rather than a consumer finance provider. Borrowers should note that while rates are advertised as low as 6.50%, these products are designed for experienced real estate investors with significant equity and deal flow, not general consumers seeking personal or home mortgages.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast closing times (5-10 business days for most products, bridge loans in 5 days)
High leverage available (up to 100% of construction costs, 93.5% LTC on fix-and-flips)
Multiple specialized loan products designed specifically for real estate investors
Minimal documentation requirements on some programs (no income/credit verification for some bridge loans and hard money products)
30-year amortization available for DSCR rental property loans
Dedicated loan originator assigned to each client throughout process
Web-based technology platform for streamlined application and document upload
cons: Significantly higher interest rates than traditional lenders (7.75%-12%+ depending on product, compared to ~3-5% for conventional mortgages)
Primarily serves real estate investors and developers, not mainstream residential borrowers
Website claims differ in timeline description (mentions both '20+ years' and 'since 2004,' creating 14-year discrepancy)
No transparency on approval rates, rejection reasons, or actual closing costs beyond interest rates
Hard money loans charge 12%+ rates and may carry additional fees not detailed on website
best_for: Real estate investors seeking fix-and-flip financing with fast turnaround and high leverage
Commercial developers needing construction financing for ground-up projects with flexible terms
Experienced investors needing bridge loans between property sales with minimal documentation
Rental property investors seeking longer-term DSCR financing (5-30 year terms) without income verification
diagnosis: Funding Alternatives is a specialized private lender best suited for experienced real estate investors and developers needing fast, flexible financing outside traditional banking channels. The critical caveat is that this is a commercial investment product lender, not a consumer mortgage provider—rates are substantially higher (7.75%-12%+) than conventional mortgages, and products are designed for investors with significant equity and development expertise, not primary residence buyers.
services: Fix & Flip loans (7.75% rates, up to 93.5% LTC, 10-day closes)
Ground-Up Construction loans (8.75% rates, 100% construction cost financing, 10-day closes)
Bridge loans (8.75% rates, up to 75% LTV, 5-day closes, 620+ FICO minimum, lite documentation)
Rental Property/DSCR loans (6.50% rates, 5/7/10/30-year terms, up to 80% LTV, no income verification)
Permanent Commercial loans (8.99% rates, up to 75% LTV, fully amortized or interest-only)
Hard Money loans ($50K-$5M+, 12%+ rates, no income/credit check, 3-15 day closes)
Free loan quote/pre-approval (no credit impact, no obligation)
Web-based loan intake and document upload system
Customized deal structuring for investor-specific needs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1100 NE 163rd St Suite 300, North Miami Beach, FL 33162
